tagline: Intelligent, Inclusive and Responsible Innovation in Healthcare

speakers.name: Dr. Yao Sun
speakers.title: Professor of Pediatrics (Neonatology), UCSF
speakers.bio: Director of Neonatology Community Services. Stanford undergrad, UCLA med school, MIT PhD in Computer Science. Research in clinical decision support for neonatal critical care.

speakers.name: Andre Lindkvist
speakers.title: Abbott Diabetes Care
speakers.bio: Plenary speaker from Abbott Diabetes Care.

speakers.name: Dr. Kate Stephenson
speakers.title: Founder, Dyad Engineering; VP Engineering, Cern Corporation
speakers.bio: 25+ years in med tech. Stanford MS & PhD in Engineering. Specializes in translating medical technologies from concept to regulated products, especially women's health.

speakers.name: Dr. Janie Mandrusov
speakers.title: T45 Labs
speakers.bio: 25+ years in cardiovascular technology with 16 patents. PhD Chemical Engineering from Columbia. SJSU BME Advisory Council member.

speakers.name: Scott Nierotka
speakers.title: Medical Device Executive
speakers.bio: 25+ years in medical devices. Most recently Director of Engineering at Lumenous Device Technologies. Founding member and former President of BMES industry chapter.

speakers.name: Soody Tronson
speakers.title: Managing Counsel, STLG Law Firm
speakers.bio: 25+ years at the intersection of law, technology, and business. Former R&D engineer at HP and Schering-Plough. Patent prosecution and IP strategy.

speakers.name: Alma Lopez
speakers.title: Senior Technical Product Manager (Healthcare & AI), Roche
speakers.bio: Builds AI-enabled and cloud-based healthcare solutions. Cross-functional global teams in regulated environments.

speakers.name: Cassi Janakos
speakers.title: COO & Co-founder, Healthy Horizons
speakers.bio: Inc. Female Founders 500 (2025). Stevie Award for Social Change Maker of the Year. Advocates for human-centered medical device design.

speakers.name: Dr. Priya Balachandran
speakers.title: Atzeyo Biosensors
speakers.bio: 25+ years in deep tech and life sciences. CEO of Huddl Health, Chief Product Officer at Atzeyo Biosensors. Former Thermo Fisher.

speakers.name: Dr. Alexander Payumo
speakers.title: Associate Professor, Biological Sciences, SJSU
speakers.bio: BS Chemistry from SJSU, PhD Stanford. Research in hormonal regulation of cardiomyocyte cell cycle for mammalian heart regeneration.

speakers.name: Dr. Kristin Sellers
speakers.title: Assistant Professor, Neurological Surgery, UCSF
speakers.bio: Research in intracranial electrical stimulation for neuropsychiatric disorders. Closed-loop neuromodulation clinical trials.

speakers.name: Dr. Onur Dur
speakers.title: VP Clinical Science and Medical Affairs, Elixir Medical
speakers.bio: 15+ years in med-tech. 50+ peer-reviewed publications, 20+ patents. Focus on cardiovascular care and Class II/III devices.
